programs.title: Custom Car Factory
programs.desc: Mechanics Kuba and Artur intend to renovate machines from World War II.The workshop participants will include: 'Kubusia', an armored car from the Warsaw Uprising, and a DKW NZ 250 motorcycle.

programs.title: Richard Hammond's Big!
programs.desc: The award-winning British presenter Richard Hammond discovers the secrets of the world's largest structures and machines.The host will explore the secrets hidden by the most famous megastructures.He will learn what makes gigantic buildings resistant to sudden weather changes and unfavorable climatic phenomena.He will also talk to the people responsible for creating the most amazing projects of the 21st century.Together with Hammond we will see, among others:the longest subway tunnel and a cargo ship the size of four football fields.The instructor will not stop at mere observation and will personally test each of the discussed structures.Through a series of interesting and amazing experiments, he will also deepen our scientific knowledge, proving that small things often have great possibilities.

programs.title: Wheeler Dealers 17
programs.desc: Each episode features Mike Brewer and former Formula 1 mechanic Marc 'Elvis' Priestley.They are struggling with the renovation of a damaged vehicle.Their goal is to sell a used car at a profit.

programs.title: Steel Buddies
programs.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.
